description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent display screen set into a pastel blue and peach front panel. The cabinet is adorned with retro-themed artwork, including stylized space motifs and playful polka dots, especially visible on the side panels. The marquee at the top displays the name 'Space Caddy' in a whimsical font, framed by a matching pastel color scheme. The control panel below the screen includes a joystick and several round buttons, designed for single-player interaction, and is bordered by a black section with a visible coin slot. The rear of the cabinet is plain black, with ventilation grilles and access panels. The overall build appears to be primarily wood or MDF with a laminate finish, typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A pastel-themed upright arcade game cabinet with retro space artwork, a marquee labeled 'Space Caddy', and a single-player control panel with joystick and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, display screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pastel blue and peach space-themed artwork and the cabinet's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black surface with ventilation grilles and access panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching space-themed graphics and cabinet profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat with a slight bezel, medium size typical of classic arcade cabinets
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and several round buttons arranged in a row, set on a black panel with pastel accents
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; pastel blue and peach background with the text 'Space Caddy' in a playful font, matching the cabinet's retro space theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Pastel blue and peach space-themed graphics with stylized stars, planets, and abstract shapes
